Description
com.bjdelacruz.katas.codewars
Contains Codewars katas.
com.bjdelacruz.katas.codewars.functionalprogramming
Contains three katas related to functional programming using lambdas.
com.bjdelacruz.katas.codewars.student
Contains four katas related to using the Java 8 stream API.

Contains LeetCode katas.
